claims.summary: Telemetry should expose rolling entropy variance.
claims.disposition: Verified rolling_spectral_entropy_variance is present and populated from finite bounded samples.

claims.summary: Telemetry should expose entropy velocity or change across the current window.
claims.disposition: Verified change and trend-state fields preserve latest-minus-earliest movement.

claims.summary: Arrival cadence should retain bounded multi-sample context rather than only one f32 delta.
claims.disposition: Verified rolling arrival sample count, mean, change, state, and host-time basis.

claims.summary: Entropy statistics must remain mechanical evidence rather than a felt-state score.
claims.disposition: Verified schema basis and epistemic lint explicitly prohibit numeric-to-felt inference.

claims.summary: Jitter and entropy peaks should be compared for co-occurrence.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded observational comparison with temporal, noncausal labeling.
